summary: Full e2e validation of GoalForge (rebrand from AtomQuest). Backend pytest suite (31 tests) PASSED 100%. Frontend Playwright validation covered landing page, login for all 3 roles (admin/manager/employee), navigation across Dashboard / My Goals / Templates / Team Goals / Check-ins / Analytics / Activity / Leaderboard, goal-creation modal, manager approve/reject UI, CSV export button, and dashboard charts. Critical previously-reported bugs (goal endpoints not returning 'id', reject taking query param, manager unable to patch team goals) are now verified FIXED.

minor.issue: Backend does NOT enforce total weightage <= 100% — only max-8-goals rule is enforced. Currently seed/test data has weightage sum 137% and is accepted. PRD says total weightage should be 100% — confirm if intended (UI shows it in red but doesn't block submission).
Cookies set with secure=True samesite=none which is correct for HTTPS cross-origin, but won't work over plain HTTP localhost — acceptable for the deployed preview env.

issues: When weightage exceeds 100%, it shows red counter (137%) but Create Goal button is still enabled — confirm intended UX

action_items: OPTIONAL: Decide whether backend should hard-reject goals when total weightage would exceed 100% (currently allowed; UI only warns).
OPTIONAL: Consider disabling 'Create Goal' submit button when running total weightage > 100% in My Goals page.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~980 lines — consider splitting routers (auth/goals/checkins/analytics/templates/ai/users) into separate files for maintainability.
/api/goals endpoints use ObjectId(goal_id) directly without try/except — if a malformed id is passed, FastAPI will return 500 instead of 404/400. Wrap in try/except bson.errors.InvalidId.

CORS uses both allow_origins=['*'] and allow_credentials=True which browsers reject by spec — works here because allow_origin_regex='.*' takes precedence, but is fragile. Use explicit origins list with credentials.
send_email_async swallows exceptions silently (good for non-blocking), but no retry/queue — fine for demo, not prod.
AI suggestion endpoint trusts response JSON parsing; add stricter validation/timeouts.
No rate limiting / brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login (playbook recommends lockout after 5 fails).
test_credentials: admin@goalforge.com/Admin@123, manager@goalforge.com/Manager@123, employee1@goalforge.com/Employee@123 — all validated working
seed_data_creation: Tests created TEST_-prefixed goals via employee1 account (left in DB; can be cleaned up via deleted=true flag or by clearing TEST_* goals).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is fully rewritten with goalforge.com creds and 31 passing tests covering auth, goals (create+id assertion, weightage validation, team-goals, approve/reject JSON body), check-ins, analytics (dashboard for all roles, completion-rates, qoq-trends, thrust-area, leaderboard, audit-trail, CSV export), templates (>=12), activities, notifications. Frontend manually verified via Playwright: landing, login, all sidebar pages, modal opens, charts render (28 SVGs on analytics), CSV export button present.
rca of the issue: N/A — previously reported bugs (goal id missing, reject JSON body, manager patch perms) are all verified fixed in this iteration via the new pytest suite.
